```python
import re

def perceive(observation_text: str) -> str:
    # Initialize agent position and status
    agent_x, agent_y = None, None
    agent_pos_reliable = False
    agent_class = None
    
    # Initialize HP tracking variables
    agent_hp_current, agent_hp_max = None, None
    previous_hp_current = None # To store HP from last turn's aux_obs
    
    # Initialize full status line and a temporary class variable from it
    agent_full_status_line = None
    agent_class_from_status_line = None
    agent_hunger_satiation_status = "Not determined." # Added for hunger/satiation
    
    # Initialize identified inventory items list. This will be populated from auxiliary_observation.
    identified_inventory_items_chars = set()
    identified_items_full_desc = [] # Store full descriptions for printing
    previous_turn_inventory_items_full_desc = [] # To store inventory from last turn for comparison

    # For new/lost/transformed items
    newly_acquired_items = []
    lost_items = []
    transformed_items = []
    
    inventory_match = None # Initialize inventory_match for later use in final block
    
    items_on_ground_explicit = []
    items_auto_collected_into_inventory_from_message = [] 
    items_in_inventory_mentioned_in_message = [] 
    items_to_pickup = [] # This will be the filtered list of truly pickable items

    # Initialize message classifications (now as a set to prevent duplicates)
    message_classifications = set()
    specific_environmental_events = [] # For other specific events like lava cooling
    
    # Initialize combat status and specific monster mentions
    combat_status = False
    specific_monsters_mentioned = [] # This will now be used to store names rather than map chars.
    agent_intended_target_monster = None # New: to store the monster agent attacked

    # New: Detailed combat events
    detailed_combat_events = []

    # Initialize character reset event flag
    character_reset_event = False

    # Initialize a list to keep track of non-functional door coordinates
    # This acts as a memory for doors that tried to be opened but failed.
    # Stored as a set of (x, y) tuples for quick lookup.
    non_functional_doors_coords = set()

    # New: To store specific interpretations of map symbols at coordinates (e.g., solidified lava)
    known_map_symbol_interpretations_by_coord = {} # Stored as {(x, y): "description", ...}
    
    # New: Turn outcome summary variable, will be built based on comprehensive logic
    turn_outcome_summary = "Turn outcome unclear." 
    
    # New: Flag to detect if 'wait' action was likely performed by the agent
    wait_action_explicitly_performed = False

    # New: Last known agent position and last action from aux_obs
    last_known_agent_position_from_aux = None
    last_known_agent_class_from_aux = None # New: to carry over agent class if status line isn't present
    last_action = "<agent_populate>; This field is to be populated by the agent's action for the next turn's auxiliary_observation." # Default to avoid errors if not found

    # Helper function for direction parsing
    def get_target_coords_from_action_and_pos(action_str: str, agent_pos_tuple: tuple) -> tuple:
        if not agent_pos_tuple: return None
        x, y = agent_pos_tuple
        direction_map = {
            "north": (x, y-1), "northeast": (x+1, y-1), "east": (x+1, y),
            "southeast": (x+1, y+1), "south": (x, y+1), "southwest": (x-1, y+1),
            "west": (x-1, y), "northwest": (x-1, y-1),
            "far north": (x, y-5), "far northeast": (x+5, y-5), "far east": (x+5, y),
            "far southeast": (x+5, y+5), "far south": (x, y+5), "far southwest": (x-5, y+5),
            "far west": (x-5, y), "far northwest": (x-5, y-5)
        }
        action_parts = action_str.strip().split()
        if action_parts and action_parts[0] in ["open", "apply", "zap"]: # apply and zap can also take direction
            if len(action_parts) > 1:
                dir_str = action_parts[-1].lower() # Assuming direction is the last part
                return direction_map.get(dir_str, None)
            # If no direction is given, target might be agent's own square or a targeted item
            return (x,y)
        return None


    # --- Raw message content ---
    message_match = re.search(r"message:\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\ncursor:|\n\nmap:|$)", observation_text)
    message_content = ""
    if message_match:
        message_content = message_match.group(1).strip()
    
    if message_content.startswith("You wait"): # Specific message for wait action
        wait_action_explicitly_performed = True


    # --- Auxiliary Observation parsing ---
    aux_obs_content = None 
    aux_obs_match = re.search(r"(?:<auxiliary_observation>|auxiliary_observation:\n|========== Start of Auxilliary Observation ==========\n)([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\n|\Z|</auxiliary_observation>|========== End of Auxilliary Observation ==========\n)", observation_text)
    
    if aux_obs_match:
        aux_obs_content = aux_obs_match.group(1).strip()
        
        if "You died in your previous attempt and have respawned as a new character" in aux_obs_content:
            character_reset_event = True

        inventory_match = re.search(r"inventory:\n([\s\S]+)", aux_obs_content)
        if inventory_match:
            inventory_items = inventory_match.group(1).strip().split('\n')
            for item in inventory_items:
                item_stripped = item.strip()
                match_ident = re.fullmatch(r"^[a-zA-Z]: .*", item_stripped)
                if match_ident:
                    identified_inventory_items_chars.add(match_ident.group(0)[0])
                    identified_items_full_desc.append(item_stripped)
        
        non_functional_doors_match = re.search(r"non_functional_doors:\n(\[.*?\])", aux_obs_content, re.DOTALL)
        if non_functional_doors_match:
            try:
                parsed_coords = eval(non_functional_doors_match.group(1))
                for coord_pair in parsed_coords:
                    if isinstance(coord_pair, tuple) and len(coord_pair) == 2:
                        non_functional_doors_coords.add(tuple(coord_pair))
            except (ValueError, SyntaxError) as e:
                pass
        
        prev_hp_match = re.search(r"previous_hp_current:\s*(\d+)", aux_obs_content)
        if prev_hp_match:
            previous_hp_current = int(prev_hp_match.group(1))

        last_known_pos_match = re.search(r"last_known_agent_position:\s*\((None|\d+),\s*(None|\d+)\)", aux_obs_content) # Changed to optionally capture None
        if last_known_pos_match:
            x_val = last_known_pos_match.group(1)
            y_val = last_known_pos_match.group(2)
            if x_val != 'None' and y_val != 'None':
                last_known_agent_position_from_aux = (int(x_val), int(y_val))
            else:
                last_known_agent_position_from_aux = None

        last_known_class_match = re.search(r"last_known_agent_class:\s*(\w+|None)", aux_obs_content) # Changed to optionally capture None
        if last_known_class_match:
            val = last_known_class_match.group(1).strip()
            last_known_agent_class_from_aux = val if val != 'None' else None

        last_action_match = re.search(r"last_action:\s*(.+)", aux_obs_content)
        if last_action_match:
            last_action_val = last_action_match.group(1).strip()
            # Only update last_action if it's not the placeholder (meaning agent provided an action)
            if not last_action_val.startswith("<agent_populate>"):
                last_action = last_action_val

        prev_inv_match = re.search(r"previous_turn_inventory_items_full_desc:\s*(\[.*?\])", aux_obs_content, re.DOTALL)
        if prev_inv_match:
            try:
                previous_turn_inventory_items_full_desc = eval(prev_inv_match.group(1))
            except (ValueError, SyntaxError) as e:
                pass

        known_map_symbol_interpretations_match = re.search(r"known_map_symbol_interpretations_by_coord:\s*(\{.*\})", aux_obs_content, re.DOTALL)
        if known_map_symbol_interpretations_match:
            try:
                parsed_map_coords = eval(known_map_symbol_interpretations_match.group(1))
                if isinstance(parsed_map_coords, dict):
                    # Convert string keys back to tuple keys if they represent coordinates
                    known_map_symbol_interpretations_by_coord = {eval(k) if k.strip().startswith('(') else k: v for k, v in parsed_map_coords.items()}
            except (ValueError, SyntaxError) as e:
                pass


    is_agent_dead = False
    if "Killed by" in message_content or "You die" in message_content or "You are dead" in message_content:
        is_agent_dead = True
    
    # --- Agent Status Line ---
    # Updated regex for status line to accurately capture optional S:X
    status_line_regex = r"Agent the (\w+)\s+St:.*?HP:(\d+)\((\d+)\)(?: Pw:\d+\(\d+\) AC:\d+ Xp:\d+/\d+)?(?:\s+S:(\d+))?(?:\s+(Satiated|Hungry|Weak|Fainting|Starving|Engorged))?" # Added named satiation status last
    all_status_line_matches = list(re.finditer(status_line_regex, observation_text, re.DOTALL))
    
    if all_status_line_matches:
        # Take the last match, as it's typically the most current status line
        agent_full_status_match = all_status_line_matches[-1]
        agent_full_status_line = agent_full_status_match.group(0).strip()
        
        agent_hp_current = int(agent_full_status_match.group(2))
        agent_hp_max = int(agent_full_status_match.group(3))

        agent_class_from_status_line = agent_full_status_match.group(1)

        # Handle satiation status extraction using group 4 for the digit and group 5 for textual status
        satiation_value_group = agent_full_status_match.group(4) 
        satiation_text_status = agent_full_status_match.group(5) 
        
        if satiation_value_group is not None:
            satiation_value = int(satiation_value_group)
            if satiation_value == 0:
                agent_hunger_satiation_status = f"Fainting/Starving (S:{satiation_value}). Based on world knowledge, agent is severely hungry."
            elif 0 < satiation_value <= 9:
                agent_hunger_satiation_status = f"Weak/Hungry (S:{satiation_value}). Based on world knowledge, agent is hungry."
            elif 10 <= satiation_value <= 19:
                agent_hunger_satiation_status = f"Satiated (S:{satiation_value}). Based on world knowledge, 'Satiated' status prevents immediate further eating."
            else: 
                agent_hunger_satiation_status = f"Engorged/Oversatiated (S:{satiation_value}). More than 'Satiated'."
        elif satiation_text_status:  # If textual satiation status is present without an S: value
            if satiation_text_status == "Satiated":
                agent_hunger_satiation_status = "Satiated. Status line contains textual satiation status, but no 'S:' value. Based on world knowledge, 'Satiated' status prevents immediate further eating."
            else:
                agent_hunger_satiation_status = f"{satiation_text_status}. Status line contains textual satiation status, but no 'S:' value." # For Hungry, Weak, etc.
        else: # No S: value and no textual status
            agent_hunger_satiation_status = "Normal satiation (no explicit 'S:' value or textual status found)."

    else:
        agent_full_status_line = "Not found."
        agent_hp_current, agent_hp_max = None, None
        agent_hunger_satiation_status = "Not determined (status line not found)."


    # --- Message Classifications and Turn Consumption ---
    is_active_prompt_found = False
    turn_consumed = True # Default, assumes action consumes a turn unless proven otherwise

    prompt_type_found = "unknown"

    # Capture prompt choices for all item selection prompts IF available
    prompt_choices_str = "N/A"
    prompt_choices_match = re.search(r"\[([a-zA-Z*? ]+)\]", message_content)
    if prompt_choices_match:
        prompt_choices_str = prompt_choices_match.group(1).strip()
    
    # Specific prompt detection, order matters!
    if re.search(r"Improvise\? \[ynq\] \(q\)", message_content):
        is_active_prompt_found = True
        prompt_type_found = "improvise_confirmation_prompt"
        message_classifications.add("active_prompt (type: improvise_confirmation_prompt)")
    elif "What do you want to use or apply?" in message_content:
        is_active_prompt_found = True
        prompt_type_found = "apply_item_selection"
        message_classifications.add("active_prompt (type: apply_item_selection_prompt)")
    elif re.search(r"In what direction\?", message_content):
        is_active_prompt_found = True
        prompt_type_found = "directional_input"
        message_classifications.add("active_prompt (type: directional_input_prompt)")
    elif re.search(r"What do you want to drink\? \[([a-zA-Z*? ]+)\]", message_content):
        is_active_prompt_found = True
        prompt_type_found = "quaff_item_selection"
        message_classifications.add("active_prompt (type: quaff_item_selection_prompt)")
    elif re.search(r"What do you want to zap\? \[([a-zA-Z*? ]+)\]", message_content):
        is_active_prompt_found = True
        prompt_type_found = "zap_item_selection"
        message_classifications.add("active_prompt (type: zap_item_selection_prompt)")
    elif re.search(r"What do you want to eat\? \[([a-zA-Z*? ]+)\]", message_content):
        is_active_prompt_found = True
        prompt_type_found = "eat_item_selection"
        message_classifications.add("active_prompt (type: eat_item_selection_prompt)")
    elif re.search(r"\[[yN]+\]", message_content) or re.search(r"\[[YN]+\]", message_content): # General Yes/No, less specific
        is_active_prompt_found = True
        # Check if it implies a 'quit' option if not caught by improvise earlier
        if "quit" in message_content.lower() or "abort" in message_content.lower():
            prompt_type_found = "yes_no_quit"
            message_classifications.add("active_prompt (type: yes_no_quit_prompt)")
        else:
            prompt_type_found = "yes_no"
            message_classifications.add("active_prompt (type: yes_no_prompt)")


    is_invalid_action_retry_message = "Your previous output did not contain a valid action. Retry" in message_content
    is_more_prompt = "--More--" in message_content

    if is_invalid_action_retry_message:
        turn_consumed = False
        message_classifications.add("invalid_action_message (type: api_invalid_action_retry)")
    elif is_more_prompt:
        turn_consumed = False
        message_classifications.add("active_prompt (type: more_prompt)")
    elif is_active_prompt_found:
        # Active prompts for input consume a turn when the agent provides initial command,
        # but not when it provides the subsequent input.
        # This logic is complex; assume for now that if an active prompt is found, and it's not a '--More--',
        # the *previous* action consumed a turn to lead to this prompt. The *response* to this prompt
        # might or might not consume a turn. The prompt itself is an indicator of turn consumption, not non-consumption.
        turn_consumed = True # The action that led to this prompt consumed a turn
    else:
        turn_consumed = True


    explicitly_turn_consuming_environmental_messages = [
        "You can't go down here", 
        "The stairs are solidly fixed to the floor",
        "You see no door there", 
        "There is nothing here to pick up",
        "Nothing happens.",
        "You can't move onto that square." # Added from a previous improvement
    ]
    
    explicit_environmental_outcome_observed = any(msg_part in message_content for msg_part in explicitly_turn_consuming_environmental_messages) or combat_status
    
    if "You can't go down here" in message_content or "The stairs are solidly fixed to the floor" in message_content:
        message_classifications.add("blocked_stairs_message")
        specific_environmental_events.append("Stairs descent blocked.")
    if "You see no door there" in message_content:
        message_classifications.add("invisible_door_message")
        specific_environmental_events.append("Attempted to open non-existent door.")
        # Try to add the inferred target as non-functional if an open action was attempted.
        # This occurs later, after agent_x, agent_y are more reliably parsed.
    if "There is nothing here to pick up." in message_content:
        message_classifications.add("non_movement_action_outcome (type: pickup_nothing)")
        specific_environmental_events.append("Attempted to pick up items, but nothing was present.")
    if "You can't move onto that square." in message_content:
        message_classifications.add("movement_blocked_message")
        specific_environmental_events.append("Movement blocked by terrain or entity.")
    
    if "The lava cools and solidifies" in message_content:
        message_classifications.add("environmental_transformation (type: lava_solidification)")
        specific_environmental_events.append("Lava solidified due to environmental effect or action.")
        # If agent position is reliable, and last action was apply/zap in a direction, and that direction had a '}', 
        # then update known_map_symbol_interpretations_by_coord for that location.
        if agent_pos_reliable and last_known_agent_position_from_aux and last_action and not last_action.startswith("<agent_populate>"):
            target_coords = get_target_coords_from_action_and_pos(last_action, last_known_agent_position_from_aux)
            if target_coords:
                 known_map_symbol_interpretations_by_coord[target_coords] = "Solidified lava (previously lava)"


    if len(message_classifications) > 1 and "general_status_update" in message_classifications:
        message_classifications.remove("general_status_update")
    elif not is_active_prompt_found and not is_invalid_action_retry_message and not explicit_environmental_outcome_observed and turn_consumed and not message_classifications:
        message_classifications.add("general_status_update")
    
    if not message_classifications: 
        message_classifications.add("general_status_update")


    # --- Items on Ground and Inventory from Message ---
    you_see_here_match = re.search(r"You see here:\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\ncursor:|\n\nmap:|\n\nAgent the \w+|$)", observation_text)
    chars_on_ground_explicit = set()
    if you_see_here_match:
        ground_content = you_see_here_match.group(1).strip()
        if ground_content:
            ground_item_matches = re.findall(r"([a-zA-Z]) - ([^\.\n]+)", ground_content)
            for char, desc in ground_item_matches:
                full_item_desc = f"{char} - {desc.strip()}"
                items_on_ground_explicit.append(full_item_desc)
                chars_on_ground_explicit.add(char)
        
    message_item_matches_in_msg = []
    if message_content and not is_active_prompt_found and not any(cls.startswith("invalid_action_message") for cls in message_classifications): 
        message_item_matches_in_msg = re.findall(r"([a-zA-Z]) - (.*?)(?:\.|\s*|$)", message_content)
        
        for match_group in message_item_matches_in_msg:
            char, desc_raw = match_group[0], match_group[1]
            desc = desc_raw.strip().rstrip('.,;:')
            if desc:
                candidate_item = f"{char} - {desc}"
                
                if char in identified_inventory_items_chars:
                    items_in_inventory_mentioned_in_message.append(candidate_item)
                elif char in chars_on_ground_explicit: 
                    pass
                else: 
                    items_auto_collected_into_inventory_from_message.append(candidate_item)
        
    potential_pickup_items_raw = []
    
    for item_desc in items_on_ground_explicit:
        char = item_desc[0]
        if char not in identified_inventory_items_chars:
            potential_pickup_items_raw.append(item_desc)
            
    items_to_pickup = sorted(list(dict.fromkeys(potential_pickup_items_raw)))
    any_items_to_pickup_on_ground = bool(items_to_pickup)
    
    if items_on_ground_explicit:
        message_classifications.add("items_on_ground_message")
    elif items_auto_collected_into_inventory_from_message:
        message_classifications.add("items_auto_collected_message")
    
    if "items_auto_collected_message" in message_classifications and "general_status_update" in message_classifications:
        message_classifications.remove("general_status_update")


    # --- Inventory Change Detection (from previous_turn_inventory_items_full_desc) ---
    current_inv_set = set(identified_items_full_desc)
    prev_inv_set = set(previous_turn_inventory_items_full_desc)

    newly_acquired_items = sorted(list(current_inv_set - prev_inv_set))
    lost_items = sorted(list(prev_inv_set - current_inv_set))

    # Identify transformed items (same char, different desc)
    transformed_items = []
    prev_inv_dict = {item.split(' - ')[0]: item for item in previous_turn_inventory_items_full_desc}
    current_inv_dict = {item.split(' - ')[0]: item for item in identified_items_full_desc}

    for char, current_full_desc in current_inv_dict.items():
        if char in prev_inv_dict and prev_inv_dict[char] != current_full_desc:
            transformed_items.append(f"{prev_inv_dict[char]} changed to {current_full_desc}")

    # --- Turn_outcome_summary ---
    if is_invalid_action_retry_message or is_more_prompt:
        turn_outcome_summary = f"No turn consumed ({'invalid action: API retry' if is_invalid_action_retry_message else 'active prompt: more_prompt'})."
    elif "blocked_stairs_message" in message_classifications:
        turn_outcome_summary = "Turn consumed - Stairs descent blocked."
    elif "invisible_door_message" in message_classifications:
        turn_outcome_summary = "Turn consumed - Action failed: 'You see no door there' message."
    elif "movement_blocked_message" in message_classifications:
        turn_outcome_summary = "Turn consumed - Movement blocked by terrain: 'You can't move onto that square.'"
    elif "non_movement_action_outcome (type: pickup_nothing)" in message_classifications:
        turn_outcome_summary = "Turn consumed - Failed to pick up items (nothing there)."
    elif combat_status:
        combat_summary_parts = []
        
        killed_monsters_summary = [re.search(r"Agent killed ([\w\s]+)\.", event).group(1).strip() for event in detailed_combat_events if re.search(r"Agent killed", event)]
        if killed_monsters_summary:
            combat_summary_parts.append(f"Agent successfully moved into and defeated hostile entity(s): {', '.join(killed_monsters_summary)}")
        elif any( "Agent hit" in event for event in detailed_combat_events) and ("You can't move onto that square." not in message_content):
             combat_summary_parts.append("Agent successfully moved into monster(s) and attacked")
        elif any( "Monster" in event and ("attacks" in event or "bites" in event) for event in detailed_combat_events):
            combat_summary_parts.append("Monster(s) attacked agent")
        elif any( "Monster" in event and "tries to move onto your square" in event for event in detailed_combat_events):
            combat_summary_parts.append("Monster(s) tried to move onto agent's square")
        elif wait_action_explicitly_performed:
            combat_summary_parts.append("Agent waited and was attacked")
        
        if combat_summary_parts:
            turn_outcome_summary = f"Turn consumed - Combat occurred: {'; '.join(combat_summary_parts)}."
        else:
            turn_outcome_summary = "Turn consumed - Combat occurred (details unspecified)."
    elif wait_action_explicitly_performed:
        turn_outcome_summary = "Turn consumed - Agent explicitly waited, doing nothing."
    elif "items_auto_collected_message" in message_classifications:
        turn_outcome_summary = "Turn consumed - Items auto-collected."
    elif is_active_prompt_found:
        turn_outcome_summary = f"Turn consumed - Action initiated, awaiting further input (active prompt: {prompt_type_found})."
    elif "general_status_update" in message_classifications:
        turn_outcome_summary = "Turn consumed - Action completed (general status update)."
    elif "environmental_transformation (type: lava_solidification)" in message_classifications:
        turn_outcome_summary = "Turn consumed - Environmental transformation: lava solidified."
    else:
        turn_outcome_summary = "Turn consumed - Action completed (unspecified successful outcome)."


    # --- Agent Position and Class ---
    cursor_x, cursor_y = None, None
    agent_class_from_cursor_section = None
    
    # Updated regex to capture both class and coords if present, or just coords
    cursor_info_match = re.search(r"cursor:\s*\n(?:Yourself a (\w+)\n)?(?:\(x=(\d+), y=(\d+)\))?", observation_text, re.DOTALL)

    if cursor_info_match:
        # Group 1: agent class name, Group 2: x-coord, Group 3: y-coord
        if cursor_info_match.group(1):
            agent_class_from_cursor_section = cursor_info_match.group(1)
        if cursor_info_match.group(2) and cursor_info_match.group(3):
            cursor_x = int(cursor_info_match.group(2))
            cursor_y = int(cursor_info_match.group(3))

    agent_pos_source_desc = "not reliably determined"

    # Priority 1: "Yourself a <class>" with coordinates from cursor section
    if agent_class_from_cursor_section and cursor_x is not None and cursor_y is not None:
        agent_x, agent_y = cursor_x, cursor_y
        agent_pos_reliable = True
        agent_pos_source_desc = "direct observation ('Yourself a [class]' indicator in cursor)"
    # Priority 2: Cursor position, IF no active prompt is present
    elif not is_active_prompt_found and cursor_x is not None and cursor_y is not None:
        agent_x, agent_y = cursor_x, cursor_y
        agent_pos_reliable = True
        agent_pos_source_desc = "inferred from cursor position (no active prompt)"
    # Priority 3: Last known agent position from aux_obs
    elif last_known_agent_position_from_aux is not None:
        agent_x, agent_y = last_known_agent_position_from_aux
        agent_pos_reliable = True
        agent_pos_source_desc = "inferred from last known position from auxiliary_observation"
    # Fallback/Default
    else:
        agent_x, agent_y = None, None
        agent_pos_reliable = False


    # Priority for agent_class: Status line > Cursor section > Auxiliary observation
    if agent_class_from_status_line:
        agent_class = agent_class_from_status_line
    elif agent_class_from_cursor_section:
        agent_class = agent_class_from_cursor_section
    elif last_known_agent_class_from_aux:
        agent_class = last_known_agent_class_from_aux
    else:
        agent_class = None # Default if none found


    # --- Map and Visible Stairs parsing ---
    map_content = ""
    map_match = re.search(r"map:\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\nAgent the \w+|$)", observation_text)
    if map_match:
        map_content = map_match.group(1).strip()
    
    known_stairs_down_location = (26, 10) # Fixed in world knowledge

    stairs_present_at_down_stairs_location = (agent_x == known_stairs_down_location[0] and agent_y == known_stairs_down_location[1]) if agent_pos_reliable else False
    
    stairs_status_message = ""
    suggested_stairs_action = ""

    stairs_explicitly_blocked_by_message = "blocked_stairs_message" in message_classifications

    if stairs_present_at_down_stairs_location:
        descent_blocked = stairs_explicitly_blocked_by_message 
        description_suffix = ""
        
        if descent_blocked: 
            if "You can't go down here" in message_content:
                description_suffix = "due to message 'You can't go down here'."
            elif "The stairs are solidly fixed to the floor" in message_content:
                description_suffix = "due to message 'The stairs are solidly fixed to the floor'."
        
        if descent_blocked:
            stairs_status_message = f"Stairs descent status: Blocked {description_suffix} The stairs are currently impassable."
            suggested_stairs_action = "Suggested action: None (stairs are blocked)."
        else:
            stairs_status_message = f"Stairs descent status: Potentially traversable (agent at stairs location {known_stairs_down_location})."
            if any_items_to_pickup_on_ground:
                suggested_stairs_action = "Suggested action: pickup (to collect items on the ground before attempting to descend stairs)."
            else: 
                suggested_stairs_action = "Suggested action: down (to descend the stairs)."
    else:
        if agent_pos_reliable:
             stairs_status_message = f"Stairs descent status: Not at the known down stairs location {known_stairs_down_location}."
        else:
             stairs_status_message = "Stairs descent status: Not reliably determined (agent position unknown)."
    
    # --- Visible points of interest (refined) ---
    adjacent_points_of_interest = []
    other_visible_points_of_interest = set() # Changed to set to collect unique descriptions
    
    visible_adjacent_hostile_entities_on_map = []
    other_visible_hostile_entities = set() # Changed to set to collect unique descriptions
    visible_doors = []
    
    unopenable_door_feedback_received = "invisible_door_message" in message_classifications
    
    recently_failed_door_coords = set()

    # Corrected map character descriptions
    map_char_descriptions = {
        '>': "Stairs down", '<': "Stairs up", '+': "Closed door", 
        'd': "Potential door (could be monster or fixed feature)", # Modified 'd' description
        '|': "Vertical wall", '-': "Horizontal wall", 
        '$': "Gold on floor", '}': "Fountain/Lava (ambiguous)", '~': "Moat/Shallow water", 
        '^': "Trap", '(': "Weapon on floor", '[': "Armor on floor",
        '%': "Comestible (food) on floor", '?': "Scroll on floor",
        '/': "Wand on floor", '!': "Potion on floor", '*': "Gem or rock on floor",
        '`': "Boulders or rocks on floor", '=': "Ring on floor",
        '"': "Amulet on floor", ',': "Gold or heap of items", '\'': "Misc. item on floor", 
        ')': "Missile weapon on floor", '_': "Altar", '{': "Lava", '#': "Corridor",
        '.': "Floor", ' ': "Empty space/darkness", ':': "Dark corridor",
    }

    # Corrected passable_map_chars
    passable_map_chars = set(['.', '#', ':', '>', '<'])
    
    # Known alphabetical map features that are *not* monsters
    # Used to prevent classifying them as "dynamically_flagged_monster_char".
    known_non_monster_alphabetical_chars = set(
        char for char, desc in map_char_descriptions.items() 
        if char.isalpha() and char not in ['d'] # 'd' is specifically excluded as per world knowledge
    )

    agent_adjacent_coordinates = []
    agent_adjacent_passable_coordinates = []

    if agent_pos_reliable and agent_x is not None and agent_y is not None:
        for dy in [-1, 0, 1]:
            for dx in [-1, 0, 1]:
                if dx == 0 and dy == 0:
                    continue

                adj_x, adj_y = agent_x + dx, agent_y + dy
                agent_adjacent_coordinates.append((adj_x, adj_y))

    if map_content and agent_pos_reliable and agent_x is not None and agent_y is not None:
        agent_map_relative_x = -1
        agent_map_relative_y = -1
        lines = map_content.split('\n')

        # Find agent's relative position on map if '@' is present
        for ay, m_line in enumerate(lines):
            if '@' in m_line:
                agent_map_relative_x = m_line.find('@')
                agent_map_relative_y = ay
                break
        
        if agent_map_relative_x != -1: # Agent's relative position on the map is found
            for y_offset, line in enumerate(lines):
                for x_offset, char in enumerate(line):
                    world_x = agent_x - (agent_map_relative_x - x_offset)
                    world_y = agent_y - (agent_map_relative_y - y_offset)
                    current_coords = (world_x, world_y)

                    dx = world_x - agent_x
                    dy = world_y - agent_y
                    
                    direction = ""
                    is_adjacent = (abs(dx) <=1 and abs(dy) <= 1 and (dx !=0 or dy != 0))
                    
                    if is_adjacent:
                        if dx == 0 and dy == -1: direction = "(north)"
                        elif dx == 1 and dy == -1: direction = "(northeast)"
                        elif dx == 1 and dy == 0: direction = "(east)"
                        elif dx == 1 and dy == 1: direction = "(southeast)"
                        elif dx == 0 and dy == 1: direction = "(south)"
                        elif dx == -1 and dy == 1: direction = "(southwest)"
                        elif dx == -1 and dy == 0: direction = "(west)"
                        elif dx == -1 and dy == -1: direction = "(northwest)"
                        
                        if char in passable_map_chars: # Use the refined list
                            agent_adjacent_passable_coordinates.append(current_coords)

                    common_non_poi_tiles = ['.', ' ', '#', ':', '-', '|']

                    if char == '@' or char in common_non_poi_tiles: 
                        continue
                    
                    # Prioritize specific known interpretations
                    if current_coords in known_map_symbol_interpretations_by_coord:
                        interpreted_desc = known_map_symbol_interpretations_by_coord[current_coords]
                        if char in ['d', '+'] and "door" in interpreted_desc.lower():
                            visible_doors.append(f"{interpreted_desc} ('{char}') {direction} at (x={world_x}, y={world_y})" if direction else f"{interpreted_desc} ('{char}') at (x={world_x}, y={world_y})")
                        elif is_adjacent:
                            adjacent_points_of_interest.append(f"{interpreted_desc} ('{char}') {direction} at (x={world_x}, y={world_y})")
                        else:
                            other_visible_points_of_interest.add(f"{interpreted_desc} ('{char}')") # Add character for clarity
                        continue # Skip further processing for this char
                    
                    # Handle doors ('+' and 'd')
                    if char in ['d', '+']:
                        door_desc_base = map_char_descriptions.get(char, "Unknown door type")
                        
                        if current_coords in non_functional_doors_coords:
                            door_info = f"{door_desc_base} (not functional/unopenable based on recent 'You see no door there' message)"
                            visible_doors.append(f"{door_info} ('{char}') {direction} at (x={world_x}, y={world_y})" if direction else f"{door_info} ('{char}') at (x={world_x}, y={world_y})")
                        else:
                            door_info = f"{door_desc_base}"
                            visible_doors.append(f"{door_info} ('{char}') {direction} at (x={world_x}, y={world_y})" if direction else f"{door_info} ('{char}') at (x={world_x}, y={world_y})")

                        if unopenable_door_feedback_received and is_adjacent:
                             recently_failed_door_coords.add(current_coords) # Collect adjacent failed door attempts
                        
                        continue

                    # Dynamically flagged monster chars: alphabetical char on map not a known static or alphabetical map feature/item
                    is_known_static_or_item = char in map_char_descriptions and char not in ['d'] # explicitly treat 'd' separately
                    
                    if char.isalpha() and not is_known_static_or_item:
                        monster_desc = f"Visible hostile entity: Monster ('{char}')"
                        
                        named_monster_from_combat = None
                        for named_m in inferred_adjacent_monsters_from_combat.copy():
                            if named_m[0].lower() == char.lower(): # Crude check, assumes first letter matches map char
                                named_monster_from_combat = named_m
                                break

                        if named_monster_from_combat:
                            visible_adjacent_hostile_entities_on_map.append(f"Combat identified hostile entity: {named_monster_from_combat} ('{char}') {direction} at (x={world_x}, y={world_y})")
                            inferred_adjacent_monsters_from_combat.discard(named_monster_from_combat)
                        elif is_adjacent:
                            visible_adjacent_hostile_entities_on_map.append(f"{monster_desc} {direction} at (x={world_x}, y={world_y})")
                        else: # Distant monster-like character
                             other_visible_hostile_entities.add(monster_desc)
                        continue
                        
                    # General POI (excluding doors, walls, identified hostile entities, and common floor/corridor tiles)
                    # And now, including chars that ARE in map_char_descriptions but skipped earlier
                    if char in map_char_descriptions: # This is a known map symbol
                         if is_adjacent:
                             adjacent_points_of_interest.append(f"{map_char_descriptions[char]} {direction} at (x={world_x}, y={world_y})")
                         else:
                             other_visible_points_of_interest.add(map_char_descriptions[char]) # Store just description
                    else: # Truly unknown non-alphabetical character on the map
                         if is_adjacent:
                             adjacent_points_of_interest.append(f"Unknown character ('{char}') {direction} at (x={world_x}, y={world_y})")
                         else:
                             other_visible_points_of_interest.add(f"Unknown character ('{char}')") # Store with char for clarity
    
    # Filter out killed monsters from inferred_adjacent_monsters_from_combat set
    killed_monsters_this_turn = set()
    for event in detailed_combat_events:
        kill_match = re.search(r"Agent killed ([\w\s]+)\.", event)
        if kill_match:
            killed_monsters_this_turn.add(kill_match.group(1).strip())

    inferred_adjacent_monsters_from_combat = {
        m for m in inferred_adjacent_monsters_from_combat if m not in killed_monsters_this_turn
    }

    all_adjacent_hostiles = visible_adjacent_hostile_entities_on_map + list(inferred_adjacent_monsters_from_combat)
    all_adjacent_hostiles = sorted(list(set(all_adjacent_hostiles)))

    non_functional_doors_coords.update(recently_failed_door_coords)

    agent_adjacent_coordinates = sorted(list(set(agent_adjacent_coordinates)))
    agent_adjacent_passable_coordinates = sorted(list(set(agent_adjacent_passable_coordinates)))
    visible_doors = sorted(list(set(visible_doors)))
    adjacent_points_of_interest = sorted(list(set(adjacent_points_of_interest)))
    
    other_visible_points_of_interest_types = sorted(list(other_visible_points_of_interest))
    other_visible_hostile_entity_types = sorted(list(other_visible_hostile_entities))

    # For summarizing other hostile entities or POIs
    def summarize_types(type_list, category_name):
        if not type_list:
            return f"No other {category_name} (distant) identified on the map."
        
        # Extract just the "types" for e.g. from potentially longer descriptions
        simplified_types_for_example = []
        for desc in type_list:
            match_monster = re.search(r"Monster \('(.+?)'\)", desc)
            match_unknown = re.search(r"Unknown character \('(.+?)'\)", desc)
            if match_monster:
                simplified_types_for_example.append(f"Monster ('{match_monster.group(1)}')" )
            elif match_unknown:
                simplified_types_for_example.append(f"Unknown ('{match_unknown.group(1)}')" )
            elif "Fountain/Lava (ambiguous)" in desc:
                simplified_types_for_example.append("Fountain/Lava")
            else: # For other POIs which are already short descriptions
                truncated_desc = desc[:25] + "..." if len(desc) > 28 else desc
                simplified_types_for_example.append(truncated_desc)

        types_to_show = simplified_types_for_example[:3] # Show up to first 3 types
        more_indicator = ", ..." if len(type_list) > 3 else "" # use len(type_list) for actual count
        return f"{len(type_list)} unique types of {category_name} visible (distant, e.g., {', '.join(types_to_show)}{more_indicator})."


    # --- Prompt-specific details ---
    prompt_details = [] 
    if "active_prompt (type: apply_item_selection_prompt)" in message_classifications:
        prompt_details.append(f"Environment is prompting for an item selection for the 'apply' action from inventory choices: [{prompt_choices_str}].")
    elif "active_prompt (type: directional_input_prompt)" in message_classifications:
        prompt_details.append("Environment is prompting for directional input.")
    elif "active_prompt (type: quaff_item_selection_prompt)" in message_classifications:
        prompt_details.append(f"Environment is prompting for an item selection for the 'quaff' action from inventory choices: [{prompt_choices_str}].")
    elif "active_prompt (type: zap_item_selection_prompt)" in message_classifications:
        prompt_details.append(f"Environment is prompting for an item selection for the 'zap' action from inventory choices: [{prompt_choices_str}].")
    elif "active_prompt (type: improvise_confirmation_prompt)" in message_classifications:
        prompt_details.append(f"Environment is presenting an 'Improvise?' Yes/No/Quit prompt: '{message_content.strip()}'")
    elif "active_prompt (type: yes_no_quit_prompt)" in message_classifications:
        prompt_details.append(f"Environment is presenting a Yes/No/Quit prompt: '{message_content.strip()}'")
    elif "active_prompt (type: yes_no_prompt)" in message_classifications:
        prompt_details.append(f"Environment is presenting a Yes/No prompt: '{message_content.strip()}'")
    elif "active_prompt (type: eat_item_selection_prompt)" in message_classifications:
        prompt_details.append(f"Environment is prompting for an item selection for the 'eat' action from inventory choices: [{prompt_choices_str}].")
    elif "active_prompt (type: more_prompt)" in message_classifications:
        prompt_details.append("Environment is presenting a '--More--' prompt, indicating more message content is available.")


    # Rebuilding perceived_features for correct ordering
    final_perceived_features = []
    
    final_perceived_features.append(f"Raw message content: {message_content}")

    # HP change analysis - simplified
    if not aux_obs_match:
        final_perceived_features.append("No auxiliary_observation section found in the raw observation (or initial turn).")
        final_perceived_features.append("HP change analysis not available (previous HP value not found or initial turn).")
    else:
        final_perceived_features.append("Auxiliary observation section present.")
        if character_reset_event:
            final_perceived_features.append("Character status: Respawned as a new character (death in previous attempt detected).")
        
        if identified_items_full_desc:
            final_perceived_features.append(f"Identified inventory items (from auxiliary_observation): {'; '.join(identified_items_full_desc)}")
        else:
            final_perceived_features.append("Inventory section found in auxiliary_observation, but no identified items were listed.")

        if newly_acquired_items:
            final_perceived_features.append(f"Newly acquired inventory items: {'; '.join(newly_acquired_items)}")
        if lost_items:
            final_perceived_features.append(f"Lost inventory items: {'; '.join(lost_items)}")
        if transformed_items:
            final_perceived_features.append(f"Transformed inventory items: {'; '.join(transformed_items)}")

        if non_functional_doors_coords:
            final_perceived_features.append(f"Known non_functional_doors_coords (history of 'd' or '+' symbols that failed to open) loaded from auxiliary_observation: {sorted(list(non_functional_doors_coords))}")
        else:
            final_perceived_features.append("No known non_functional_doors_coords loaded from auxiliary_observation (no 'd' or '+' symbols have failed to open yet in history).")
        
        if known_map_symbol_interpretations_by_coord:
            # Convert tuple keys to string representation for eval in aux_output, but display as tuples
            display_map_interpretations = {str(k): v for k, v in known_map_symbol_interpretations_by_coord.items()}
            final_perceived_features.append(f"Known map symbol interpretations (from auxiliary_observation): {display_map_interpretations}")
        else:
            final_perceived_features.append("No known map symbol interpretations loaded from auxiliary_observation.")

        # Consistent HP change analysis logic
        if not is_agent_dead and not character_reset_event: 
            if previous_hp_current is not None:
                if agent_hp_current is not None: 
                    if agent_hp_current > previous_hp_current:
                        final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent HP increased from {previous_hp_current} to {agent_hp_current}. Regeneration occurred.")
                    elif agent_hp_current < previous_hp_current:
                        final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent HP decreased from {previous_hp_current} to {agent_hp_current}. Damage taken.")
                    else: 
                         if agent_hp_current is not None and agent_hp_max is not None and agent_hp_current < agent_hp_max:
                             final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent HP remained at {agent_hp_current}/{agent_hp_max}. No regeneration or damage this turn.")
                         elif agent_hp_current is not None and agent_hp_max is not None:
                             final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent HP remained full at {agent_hp_current}/{agent_hp_max}.")
                         else: # current HP values are None
                             final_perceived_features.append("Current HP not parsed (status line issue), cannot determine HP change.")
                else: # Current HP is None but previous HP was known
                    final_perceived_features.append("Current HP not parsed (status line issue), cannot determine HP change.")
            else: # previous_hp_current is None, indicating initial measurement or no HP in aux_obs
                 final_perceived_features.append("Previous HP not known from auxiliary observation (initial measurement for this agent session).")
        elif is_agent_dead:
            final_perceived_features.append("Agent is dead, HP change analysis not applicable.")
        elif character_reset_event:
            final_perceived_features.append("Agent respawned, HP treated as initial, change analysis not applicable.")

    if is_agent_dead and not character_reset_event: # Only if dead and not respawning in the same turn
        final_perceived_features.append("Agent status: dead (death message detected).")
    
    agent_class_output_str = ""
    # Simplified agent class output and added last_known_agent_class_from_aux
    if agent_class_from_status_line and agent_class_from_cursor_section and (agent_class_from_status_line.lower() != agent_class_from_cursor_section.lower()):
            agent_class_output_str = f"Agent class: {agent_class_from_status_line} (from status line, but '{agent_class_from_cursor_section}' from cursor section)."
    elif agent_class_from_status_line:
        agent_class_output_str = f"Agent class: {agent_class_from_status_line} (from status line)."
    elif agent_class_from_cursor_section:
        agent_class_output_str = f"Agent class: {agent_class_from_cursor_section} (from 'Yourself a [class]' indicator in cursor)."
    elif last_known_agent_class_from_aux:
        agent_class_output_str = f"Agent class: {last_known_agent_class_from_aux} (inferred from last known class from aux_observation)."
    else:
        agent_class_output_str = "Agent class: Not reliably determined."

    final_perceived_features.append(agent_class_output_str)


    if agent_full_status_line != "Not found.":
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent full status line: {agent_full_status_line}")
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent HP: Current={agent_hp_current}, Max={agent_hp_max}")
        
        if agent_hp_current is not None and agent_hp_max is not None: 
            if agent_hp_current == agent_hp_max:
                final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent HP is full (at {agent_hp_current}/{agent_hp_max}).")
            else:
                final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent HP is not full (at {agent_hp_current}/{agent_hp_max}).")
                final_perceived_features.append("Regeneration is possible over turns, but not guaranteed and can be prevented or reversed by monster attacks.")
        else:
            final_perceived_features.append("Agent HP values could not be parsed from status line.")
        
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent hunger/satiation status: {agent_hunger_satiation_status}")
    else:
        final_perceived_features.append("Agent full status line: Not found.")
        final_perceived_features.append("Agent HP: Not found in status line.")
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent hunger/satiation status: {agent_hunger_satiation_status}")


    if not is_agent_dead and not character_reset_event: 
        if agent_pos_reliable and agent_x is not None and agent_y is not None:
            final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent actual map position: (x={agent_x}, y={agent_y}) ({agent_pos_source_desc}).")

            if agent_adjacent_coordinates:
                 final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent adjacent coordinates: {agent_adjacent_coordinates}")
                 if agent_adjacent_passable_coordinates:
                     final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent adjacent walkable coordinates: {agent_adjacent_passable_coordinates}")
                 else:
                     final_perceived_features.append("No adjacent walkable coordinates identified.")
            else:
                final_perceived_features.append("Agent adjacent coordinates: Not reliably determined (agent position unknown, despite best efforts).") # This message should probably only appear if map_content is also missing or '@' not found.
        else: # agent_pos_reliable is false
            final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent actual map position: Not reliably determined ({agent_pos_source_desc}).")
            final_perceived_features.append("Agent adjacent coordinates: Not reliably determined (agent position unknown).")
            if map_content:
                final_perceived_features.append("Map content is present, but agent's precise location and relative positions of map elements could not be determined.")
            else:
                 final_perceived_features.append("No map content present to infer agent-relative positions.")


            final_perceived_features.append("Agent adjacent walkable coordinates: Not reliably determined (agent position unknown).")

        if cursor_x is not None and cursor_y is not None:
                if is_active_prompt_found: # Cursor is likely on prompt, not map
                    final_perceived_features.append(f"Cursor position: (x={cursor_x}, y={cursor_y}) (likely prompt focus, agent's map location not reliably known).")
                elif agent_pos_reliable and cursor_x == agent_x and cursor_y == agent_y:
                    final_perceived_features.append(f"Cursor position: (x={cursor_x}, y={cursor_y}) (matching agent map location).")
                else: 
                     # This scenario means cursor is seen, but either agent_pos is unreliable, or cursor is not at agent_pos 
                     # but no active prompt. This should probably not happen if agent_pos logic is perfect.
                     final_perceived_features.append(f"Cursor position: (x={cursor_x}, y={cursor_y}) (may indicate prompt focus or agent location if map position is unreliable).")
        else:
            final_perceived_features.append("Cursor position: Not found.")
            
    else:
        if cursor_x is not None and cursor_y is not None:
            final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent is dead or respawned. No reliable agent map position. Cursor visible at: (x={cursor_x}, y={cursor_y}).")
        else:
            final_perceived_features.append("Agent is dead or respawned. No reliable agent map position or cursor visible.")


    if agent_pos_reliable and agent_x is not None and agent_y is not None:
        if agent_x == known_stairs_down_location[0] and agent_y == known_stairs_down_location[1]:
            final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent is currently at the known down stairs location {known_stairs_down_location}.")
        else:
            final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent is not at the known down stairs location {known_stairs_down_location}.")
    else:
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent position not reliably determined, cannot ascertain if agent is at stairs location {known_stairs_down_location}.")


    final_perceived_features.append(f"Message classifications: {', '.join(sorted(list(message_classifications)))}.")
    final_perceived_features.append(f"Turn_consumption_status: {turn_consumed}")

    final_perceived_features.append(f"Turn_outcome_summary: {turn_outcome_summary}")
    
    if specific_environmental_events:
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Specific environmental events: {'; '.join(specific_environmental_events)}")
    else:
        final_perceived_features.append("No specific environmental events identified.")

    if items_on_ground_explicit:
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Items explicitly on the ground: {', '.join(items_on_ground_explicit)}")
    else:
        final_perceived_features.append("No specific items explicitly found on the ground.")
    
    if items_auto_collected_into_inventory_from_message: 
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Items auto-collected and added to inventory from message content (not explicitly on ground): {', '.join(items_auto_collected_into_inventory_from_message)}")
    else: 
        final_perceived_features.append("No items auto-collected into inventory from message content.")


    if items_in_inventory_mentioned_in_message:
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Inventory items mentioned in message content: {', '.join(items_in_inventory_mentioned_in_message)}")
    else:
        final_perceived_features.append("No inventory items mentioned in message content.")

    if items_to_pickup:
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Items to pickup from ground (not in inventory): {', '.join(items_to_pickup)}")
        final_perceived_features.append("Suggested action: pickup (to collect items on the ground).")
    else:
        final_perceived_features.append("No items found on the ground that are not already in inventory.")
    final_perceived_features.append(f"Any_items_to_pickup_on_ground: {any_items_to_pickup_on_ground}")
    
    final_perceived_features.append(f"Combat_status: {combat_status}")
    if detailed_combat_events:
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Detailed combat events: {'; '.join(detailed_combat_events)}")
    else:
        final_perceived_features.append("No detailed combat events identified in the message content.")
    
    if specific_monsters_mentioned:
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Specific monsters mentioned in message content: {'; '.join(specific_monsters_mentioned)}")
    else:
        final_perceived_features.append("No specific monsters mentioned in message content.")

    if agent_intended_target_monster:
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent's intended target monster identified from message context: {agent_intended_target_monster}.")
    else:
        final_perceived_features.append("Agent's intended target monster not identified from message context.")
    
    if visible_doors:
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Visible doors on the map: {', '.join(visible_doors)}")
    else:
        final_perceived_features.append("No visible doors identified on the map.")

    if unopenable_door_feedback_received:
        inferred_failed_door_target = None
        if last_action and not last_action.startswith("<agent_populate>") and last_action.startswith("open") and last_known_agent_position_from_aux:
            inferred_failed_door_target = get_target_coords_from_action_and_pos(last_action, last_known_agent_position_from_aux)
        
        if inferred_failed_door_target:
            # Check if this target appears in visible doors or non_functional_doors_coords
            target_is_known_door = False
            for door_desc in visible_doors:
                # Need to be careful with coordinate string representations
                if f"at (x={inferred_failed_door_target[0]}, y={inferred_failed_door_target[1]})" in door_desc:
                    target_is_known_door = True
                    break
            if not target_is_known_door and inferred_failed_door_target in non_functional_doors_coords:
                target_is_known_door = True

            if target_is_known_door:
                final_perceived_features.append(f"Unopenable door feedback received: 'You see no door there' message for inferred target {inferred_failed_door_target} from last action '{last_action}'. This target appears to be an unopenable door.")
                non_functional_doors_coords.add(inferred_failed_door_target) # Add to history
                # Also, update known_map_symbol_interpretations_by_coord with a clear "unopenable door" status
                known_map_symbol_interpretations_by_coord[inferred_failed_door_target] = "Unopenable door (feedback received)"
            else:
                final_perceived_features.append(f"Unopenable door feedback received: 'You see no door there' message for inferred target {inferred_failed_door_target} from last action '{last_action}'. This target did not visibly appear to be a door in the current map observation or in the history. It might be a non-existent feature or a map parsing error.")
        else:
            final_perceived_features.append(f"Unopenable door feedback received: 'You see no door there' message was displayed, but no specific adjacent door could be identified or inferred from `last_action`.")
        
    else:
        final_perceived_features.append("No 'You see no door there' feedback received regarding adjacent doors.")

    all_adjacent_hostiles = sorted(list(set(all_adjacent_hostiles)))
    if all_adjacent_hostiles:
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Identified adjacent hostile entities: {'; '.join(all_adjacent_hostiles)}")
    else:
        final_perceived_features.append("No identified adjacent hostile entities.")

    if agent_pos_reliable: # Append reliable tag only if agent_pos_reliable is true
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Other visible hostile entities (beyond immediate vicinity) on the map: {summarize_types(other_visible_hostile_entity_types, 'hostile entities')} (agent position {agent_pos_source_desc}).")
    else:
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Other visible hostile entities (beyond immediate vicinity) on the map: {summarize_types(other_visible_hostile_entity_types, 'hostile entities')}")


    if adjacent_points_of_interest:
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Immediately adjacent points of interest on the map (excluding doors, walls, identified hostile entities, and common floor/corridor tiles): {'; '.join(adjacent_points_of_interest)}")
    else:
        final_perceived_features.append("No immediately adjacent points of interest identified on the map (excluding doors, walls, identified hostile entities, and common floor/corridor tiles).")

    if agent_pos_reliable: # Append reliable tag only if agent_pos_reliable is true
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Other visible points of interest (beyond immediate vicinity, excluding doors, walls, identified hostile entities and common floor/corridor tiles): {summarize_types(other_visible_points_of_interest_types, 'points of interest')} (agent position {agent_pos_source_desc}).")
    else:
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Other visible points of interest (beyond immediate vicinity, excluding doors, walls, identified hostile entities and common floor/corridor tiles): {summarize_types(other_visible_points_of_interest_types, 'points of interest')}")


    final_perceived_features.append(f"Stairs_explicitly_blocked_by_message (from current message): {stairs_explicitly_blocked_by_message}")
    if stairs_status_message:
        final_perceived_features.append(stairs_status_message)
    if suggested_stairs_action:
        final_perceived_features.append(suggested_stairs_action)

    if prompt_details:
        final_perceived_features.extend(prompt_details)
    
    aux_output_features = []
    
    # Ensure previous_hp_current is correctly placed using the currently parsed HP
    aux_output_features.append(f"previous_hp_current: {agent_hp_current if agent_hp_current is not None else 'N/A'}")
    
    # Persist last_known_agent_position for the next turn
    if agent_pos_reliable and agent_x is not None and agent_y is not None:
      aux_output_features.append(f"last_known_agent_position: ({agent_x}, {agent_y})")
    else: # If no position is reliable, store 'None'
      aux_output_features.append(f"last_known_agent_position: None")
    
    # Persist last_known_agent_class for the next turn
    if agent_class:
        aux_output_features.append(f"last_known_agent_class: {agent_class}")
    else:
        aux_output_features.append(f"last_known_agent_class: None")

    # Placeholder for last_action to be populated by the agent's actual turn command
    aux_output_features.append(f"last_action: <agent_populate>; This field is to be populated by the agent's action for the next turn's auxiliary_observation.")
    
    aux_output_features.append(f"previous_turn_inventory_items_full_desc: {identified_items_full_desc}")

    if non_functional_doors_coords:
        aux_output_features.append(f"non_functional_doors: {sorted(list(non_functional_doors_coords))}")
    if known_map_symbol_interpretations_by_coord:
        # Convert tuple keys to string representation for eval, as tuple keys are not valid in string-repr dicts
        serializable_map_interpretations = {str(k): v for k, v in known_map_symbol_interpretations_by_coord.items()}
        aux_output_features.append(f"known_map_symbol_interpretations_by_coord: {serializable_map_interpretations}")
    
    final_perceived_features.append("\n========== Start of Auxilliary Observation ==========")
    final_perceived_features.extend(aux_output_features)
    final_perceived_features.append("========== End of Auxilliary Observation ==========")


    return "\n".join(final_perceived_features)
```

```python
import re

    identified_items_full_desc = [] # Store full descriptions for printing

    # For new/lost/transformed items
    newly_acquired_items = []
    lost_items = []
    transformed_items = []
    
    inventory_match = None # Initialize inventory_match for later use in final block

    items_auto_collected_into_inventory_from_message = [] 
    items_in_inventory_mentioned_in_message = [] 
    items_to_pickup = [] # This will be the filtered list of truly pickable items

    message_classifications = set()
    specific_environmental_events = [] # For other specific events like lava cooling
    
    # Initialize combat status and specific monster mentions
    combat_status = False
    specific_monsters_mentioned = [] # This will now be used to store names rather than map chars.
    agent_intended_target_monster = None # New: to store the monster agent attacked

    # New: Detailed combat events
    detailed_combat_events = []
    inferred_adjacent_monsters_from_combat = set() # Initialize here to prevent UnboundLocalError

    # Initialize character reset event flag
    character_reset_event = False

    # Initialize a list to keep track of non-functional door coordinates
    # This acts as a memory for doors that tried to be opened but failed.
    # Stored as a set of (x, y) tuples for quick lookup.
    non_functional_doors_coords = set()

    # New: To store specific interpretations of map symbols at coordinates (e.g., solidified lava)
    known_map_symbol_interpretations_by_coord = {} # Stored as {(x, y): "description", ...}
    
    # New: Turn outcome summary variable, will be built based on comprehensive logic
    turn_outcome_summary = "Turn outcome unclear." 
    
    # New: Flag to detect if 'wait' action was likely performed by the agent
    wait_action_explicitly_performed = False

    # New: Last known agent position and last action from aux_obs
    last_known_agent_position_from_aux = None
    last_known_agent_class_from_aux = None # New: to carry over agent class if status line isn't present
    last_action = "unknown_action" # Default to avoid errors if not found

    # Helper function for direction parsing
    def get_target_coords_from_action_and_pos(action_str: str, agent_pos_tuple: tuple) -> tuple:
        if not agent_pos_tuple: return None
        x, y = agent_pos_tuple
        direction_map = {
            "north": (x, y-1), "northeast": (x+1, y-1), "east": (x+1, y),
            "southeast": (x+1, y+1), "south": (x, y+1), "southwest": (x-1, y+1),
            "west": (x-1, y), "northwest": (x-1, y-1),
            "far north": (x, y-5), "far northeast": (x+5, y-5), "far east": (x+5, y),
            "far southeast": (x+5, y+5), "far south": (x, y+5), "far southwest": (x-5, y+5),
            "far west": (x-5, y), "far northwest": (x-5, y-5)
        }
        action_parts = action_str.strip().split()
        if action_parts and action_parts[0] in ["open", "apply", "zap"]: # apply and zap can also take direction
            if len(action_parts) > 1:
                dir_str = action_parts[-1].lower() # Assuming direction is the last part
                return direction_map.get(dir_str, None)
            # If no direction is given, target might be agent's own square or a targeted item
            return (x,y)
        return None


    # --- Raw message content ---
    message_match = re.search(r"message:\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\ncursor:|\n\nmap:|$)", observation_text)
    message_content = ""
    if message_match:
        message_content = message_match.group(1).strip()

        wait_action_explicitly_performed = True


    # --- Auxiliary Observation parsing ---
    aux_obs_content = None

    if aux_obs_match:
        aux_obs_content = aux_obs_match.group(1).strip()
        
        if "You died in your previous attempt and have respawned as a new character" in aux_obs_content:

        inventory_match = re.search(r"inventory:\n([\s\S]+)", aux_obs_content)
        if inventory_match:
            inventory_items = inventory_match.group(1).strip().split('\n')
            for item in inventory_items:
                item_stripped = item.strip()
                match_ident = re.fullmatch(r"^[a-zA-Z]: .*", item_stripped)
                if match_ident:
                    identified_inventory_items_chars.add(match_ident.group(0)[0])
                    identified_items_full_desc.append(item_stripped)
        
        non_functional_doors_match = re.search(r"non_functional_doors:\n(\[.*?\])", aux_obs_content, re.DOTALL)
        if non_functional_doors_match:
            try:

                for coord_pair in parsed_coords:
                    if isinstance(coord_pair, tuple) and len(coord_pair) == 2:
                        non_functional_doors_coords.add(tuple(coord_pair))
            except (ValueError, SyntaxError) as e:
                pass
        
        prev_hp_match = re.search(r"previous_hp_current:\s*(\d+)", aux_obs_content)
        if prev_hp_match:
            previous_hp_current = int(prev_hp_match.group(1))

        last_known_pos_match = re.search(r"last_known_agent_position:\s*\((\d+),\s*(\d+)\)", aux_obs_content)
        if last_known_pos_match:
            last_known_agent_position_from_aux = (int(last_known_pos_match.group(1)), int(last_known_pos_match.group(2)))

        last_known_class_match = re.search(r"last_known_agent_class:\s*(\w+)", aux_obs_content)
        if last_known_class_match:
            last_known_agent_class_from_aux = last_known_class_match.group(1).strip()

        last_action_match = re.search(r"last_action:\s*(.+)", aux_obs_content)

            last_action = last_action_match.group(1).strip()

            if "<agent_populate>" in last_action:
                last_action = "unknown_action"


        prev_inv_match = re.search(r"previous_turn_inventory_items_full_desc:\s*(\[.*?\])", aux_obs_content, re.DOTALL)
        if prev_inv_match:
            try:
                previous_turn_inventory_items_full_desc = eval(prev_inv_match.group(1))
            except (ValueError, SyntaxError) as e:
                pass

        known_map_symbol_interpretations_match = re.search(r"known_map_symbol_interpretations_by_coord:\s*(\{.*\})", aux_obs_content, re.DOTALL)
        if known_map_symbol_interpretations_match:
            try:
                parsed_map_coords = eval(known_map_symbol_interpretations_match.group(1))
                if isinstance(parsed_map_coords, dict):
                    known_map_symbol_interpretations_by_coord = {eval(k) if k.strip().startswith('(') else k: v for k, v in parsed_map_coords.items()}
            except (ValueError, SyntaxError) as e:
                pass


    is_agent_dead = False
    if "Killed by" in message_content or "You die" in message_content or "You are dead" in message_content:
        is_agent_dead = True
    
    # --- Agent Status Line ---
    # Updated regex for status line to accurately capture optional S:X
    status_line_regex = r"Agent the (\w+)\s+St:.*?HP:(\d+)\((\d+)\)(?: Pw:\d+\(\d+\) AC:\d+ Xp:\d+/\d+)?(?:\s+S:(\d+))?(?:\s+(Satiated|Hungry|Weak|Fainting|Starving|Engorged))?" # Added named satiation status last
    all_status_line_matches = list(re.finditer(status_line_regex, observation_text, re.DOTALL))
    
    if all_status_line_matches:
        # Take the last match, as it's typically the most current status line
        agent_full_status_match = all_status_line_matches[-1]
        agent_full_status_line = agent_full_status_match.group(0).strip()
        
        agent_hp_current = int(agent_full_status_match.group(2))
        agent_hp_max = int(agent_full_status_match.group(3))

        agent_class_from_status_line = agent_full_status_match.group(1)

        # Handle satiation status extraction using group 4 for the digit and group 5 for textual status
        satiation_value_group = agent_full_status_match.group(4) 
        satiation_text_status = agent_full_status_match.group(5) 
        
        if satiation_value_group is not None:
            satiation_value = int(satiation_value_group)
            if satiation_value == 0:
                agent_hunger_satiation_status = f"Fainting/Starving (S:{satiation_value}). Based on world knowledge, agent is severely hungry."
            elif 0 < satiation_value <= 9:
                agent_hunger_satiation_status = f"Weak/Hungry (S:{satiation_value}). Based on world knowledge, agent is hungry."
            elif 10 <= satiation_value <= 19:
                agent_hunger_satiation_status = f"Satiated (S:{satiation_value}). Based on world knowledge, 'Satiated' status prevents immediate further eating."
            else: 
                agent_hunger_satiation_status = f"Engorged/Oversatiated (S:{satiation_value}). More than 'Satiated'."
        elif satiation_text_status:  # If textual satiation status is present without an S: value
            if satiation_text_status == "Satiated":

    combat_patterns = [

    for pattern, event_type in combat_patterns:
```
